title: Mexican Squid and Croquette Fritters
description: A delicious fusion of Mexican and seafood flavors, these crispy fritters are perfect for a snack or light meal.

ingredients.name: Baby squid, cleaned and cut into small pieces

instructions: Heat the olive oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add the chopped onion and cook until translucent, about 3-4 minutes.
Add the minced garlic and cook for another minute, until fragrant.
Add the squid pieces and cook for 2-3 minutes, until they start to opaque.
Add the crushed croquettes, chopped cilantro, and lime juice. Cook for another 2-3 minutes, until the mixture is well combined.
Season with salt and pepper to taste.
Using a spoon or small ice cream scoop, form the mixture into small patties.
Heat about 1/2 inch of oil in a large skillet over medium heat.
When the oil is hot, add a few of the patties and cook for 2-3 minutes on each side, until golden brown and crispy.
